做皇帝可以，但决不认命。要做，就做天古第一帝！
没有金手指，没有超高的武力，也没有神鬼的智谋。但是我有超前的见识，先进的知识，照样玩转三国。
名将我要，谋士我收，美女也不错过，为天下百姓谋太平盛世，为大汉创立不朽帝国。
任你雄兵百万，战将千员，谋臣如雨，围困万千种，我亦岿然不动。最终击败所有强敌，一统天下，成就天古一帝，然后将目光看向更高，更远！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/fb6447ab3f91359b5c0a65129a2cc82c","author":"虎啸山林多情剑","author_id":"","book_id":"6922340639514299399","book_name":"穿越三国，开局收猛将黄忠","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6922347757084606989","read_count":"16264","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1239367"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"588","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c44ec25d0ad52b17b3576626961dbb10~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446022&x-signature=1Ue%2Fb8V3p8%2BbASnpNCEMDA5QQyI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"742906725409959","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231833425D23AB80013979AD12F1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":69,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12787,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13198,"reply_count":11,"show_pv"
